bra-att-veta.title: Good to Know
bra-att-veta.intro: What clothing and equipment do you need to become a Scout? You don't need anything special to get started in the Sea Scouts. However, there are a few items that can be useful to have or borrow after a while.
scoutEquipment: Scout uniform (T-shirt, polo shirt, or scout shirt with neckerchief)
A pair of hiking shoes, boots, or ankle boots
Something to eat from, e.g. a plate or camping bowl
bra-att-veta.readMore: Read more about the scout uniform here →
bra-att-veta.sectionTwoTitle: What makes HSS different from other Scout groups?
bra-att-veta.sectionTwoIntro: Of course, it's our stylish, practical, and durable HSS sweaters!
scoutStoreClothes: HSS cap: A must in the forest and at sea: 150:-
HSS bundle: A bargain on the lot: 550:-
bra-att-veta.sectionTwoParagraphOne: The easiest way to buy a sweater is at the scout's event in November or at the summer closing event in June.
bra-att-veta.sectionThreeTitle: You can also, of course, email:
bra-att-veta.sectionFourParagraph: Please note: when an HSS sweater has reached the end of its life, it should be discarded rather than donated to a clothing collection. HSS sweaters are intended exclusively for HSS members and no one else!
